title: cortex.graph.state.<runId>.v1 data payload
description: Lifecycle event published by the cortex-graph sidecar on cortex.graph.state.<runId>. Wrapped in a CloudEvents 1.0 envelope and then the standard HMAC envelope { data, sig } per docs/NATS-CONTRACT.md V2 contract.

runId.description: Stable run identifier produced by the orchestrator; matches RunResponse.runId.

nodeName.description: Graph node that emitted this lifecycle event (planner|executor|human_review|verifier).

status.description: Lifecycle phase. `awaiting_human` is published when the graph interrupts before human_review.

output.description: Node output payload. Empty object when no payload is available (e.g. pending).

error.description: Structured error envelope when status=failed; null otherwise.

ts.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the lifecycle transition was observed.

checkpoint.description: Optional Postgres checkpoint id for the snapshot that produced this event.
